input.command: npx tsx src/cli.ts add "buy milk"; echo "---"; npx tsx src/cli.ts add "walk dog"; echo "---list---"; npx tsx src/cli.ts list; rm -f todos.json

content.text:
Works. The CLI is at `src/cli.ts`:

- `add <text>` reads `todos.json` (defaulting to empty if absent), appends the item, and writes it back.
- `list` prints each stored todo on its own line in insertion order, printing nothing when empty.

Todos persist in `todos.json` in the current working directory. Verified end-to-end: two adds followed by `list` printed exactly `buy milk` / `walk dog` in order.
